panels.title: Average top 30 days/year · Rollup
panels.description:
Rollup-based. This panel still uses precomputed rollup metrics and does not yet run on a pure raw-data query.

Uses the average yield of the best 30 days per year. This can help identify possible degradation, but must be interpreted in context. Individual years are not conclusive on their own.

panels.title: Average top 5 days/month · Rollup
panels.description:
Rollup-based. This panel still uses precomputed rollup metrics and does not yet run on a pure raw-data query.

Uses the average yield of the best 5 days per month. This can help identify possible degradation, but must be interpreted in context. Individual months are not conclusive on their own.

panels.title: Monthly costs · Rollup

targets.expr:
WITH (
  monthlyImport = sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_grid_import_cost_daily_eur[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_year, local_month),
  monthlyExport = sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_grid_export_credit_daily_eur[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_year, local_month),
)
label_join(
  label_set(clamp_min(monthlyImport - monthlyExport, 0), "kind", "Costs"),
  "series", " ", "local_year", "kind"
)

WITH (
  monthlyImport = sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_grid_import_cost_daily_eur[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_year, local_month),
  monthlyExport = sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_grid_export_credit_daily_eur[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_year, local_month),
  yearlyExport = sum(sum_over_time((last_over_time(evcc_grid_export_credit_daily_eur[1d]))[$__range:1d])) by (local_year),
)
label_join(
  label_set(clamp_min(monthlyExport - monthlyImport, 0), "kind", "Income"),
  "series", " ", "local_year", "kind"
)
and on (local_year) (yearlyExport > 0)

panels.title: PV Anlage Amortisation · Rollup
panels.description:
Rollup-based. This panel still uses precomputed rollup metrics and does not yet run on a pure raw-data query.

For less than 365 days of data, values are extrapolated to a full year with corresponding inaccuracy depending on the captured period.

title: VM: EVCC: All-time Raw
description: Experimental hybrid dashboard: panels with the title suffix "· Rollup" still use precomputed rollup metrics. In the unmarked totals/gauge panels, PV, home and loadpoints use validated raw-data paths; grid import and feed-in remain on rollups for now.
